title: Hianjoo Cat Feather Teaser Set 12 pcs, Interactive Toys for Cats 2 Retractable Cat Wand Funny Sticks and 10 Replacement Feather Toys with Bell for Kitten Catcher Having Fun Exercise Playing
features: 😺 Package Include 😺 2pcs flexible cat wands + 2pcs furry trail + 3 pcs wiggle worms + 5pcs feather teaser, help your cats to flip, jump, pounce, chase. Bring your kitty so much funs.

🐾 Retractable and Flexible Wand 🐾 The cat toy wand can be extended from 13 inch to 32 inch easier, and have soft and skid-proof foam handle and 24 inch string. It's very light, flexible, durable and easy to store.

😺 Cats Feather Teaser Set 😺 With 10 pcs different feather and worm toys with bells, increase kitten’s interest and stimulate cat’s sense. Multi feathers and worms refills have more play options and more fun.

🐾 Safe and High Quality 🐾 Teasers are made from safe, eco-friendly, non-toxic natural material. The telescopic fishing rod is made of new elasticity and hardness material, more flexible, lightweight and durable.
😺 Ideal Gift for Cats 😺 This cat toys can provide hours of exercise and amusement to you and your cat. Help to interactive with your kittens and build trust and companionship with your cats.
description: Product Description This cat toy can make your pet do more exercise during chasing, jumping, pounce, then keep healthier. It can also enhance the relations with you and your pet. Both you two would love it. Features: The extended wand and string are long enough to cover a large space for cats to play, and can keep your fingers away from sharp claws, no more scratched hands. 10 attachments are included to keep cat’s fresh interests, and with bells can catch cat’s interest. Multi feathers and worms refills provide more options and more fun. Cat-teasing would no longer be a tough job for you. You can even sit on the couch watching TV while teasing cats with this cat toys wand. 2 * flexible cat wands (Black + Blue) 3 * wiggle worms 5 * feather teaser 2 * furry trail Choose a real suitable and good gifts for your lovely cat. 1. Do not over-excited the cat, the energy of the cat is limited. Please control the game time, do not let pets play for too long. 2. Do not let cats play too intensely to avoid injury, especially to kittens. 3. It is best to limit the interaction time with the cat to less than a half hour to avoid the cat from playing too long and getting exhausted. 4. The cat toys are designed to increase the interaction between people and pets. Do not let your pet be alone with the toy, and supervise your cat when playing to avoid accidentally eating it. 5. Keep the toy in a safe place that is out of reach of children and pets. 6. If the product is damaged, please stop using it immediately to avoid harm to pets. 7. Clean the cat toys regularly to prevent bacterial growth. Wipe the cat toys with a damp cloth and make sure it is completely dry before use.
